title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Naukri.com Capital India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Naukri.com Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Naukri.com Capital India are looking for an experienced Software Engineer based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Naukri.com Capital India:
Naukri.com Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri.com Capital India!
